Use: Adds a mount to the player's mount collection.
"The trusted mechanical steed of Engineer Figgles, made by accident trying to make improved models of his mechanical whelps."
Use: Adds a mount to the player's mount collection.
"Forced to recall the model after numerous complaints of an "uncontrollable throttle", Gnomish engineers now refer to a proto-type blunder as a "model B"."
Use: Adds a mount to the player's mount collection.
"This historic piece of gnomish engineering was forced into retirement due to its extremely "touchy" gyroscometer."
Use: Adds a mount to the player's mount collection.
"I've not seen this breed in ages, but when they're ram tough they stick around. - Veron Amberstill."
Races: Human, Dwarf, Night Elf, Gnome, High Elf
Use: Adds a mount to the player's mount collection.
"Male rams will often smash their thick skulls against each other for hours to impress a female. In that way, they're very similar to dwarves."
Use: Adds a mount to the player's mount collection.
"When Baron Rivendare became a champion of the Scourge, he condemned his favorite horse to join him in undeath."

Use: Absorbs 1950 to 3250 frost damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Absorbs 1950 to 3250 fire damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Absorbs 1950 to 3250 nature damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Absorbs 1950 to 3250 shadow damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Absorbs 1950 to 3250 holy damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Absorbs 1950 to 3250 arcane damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Attempts to remove one Curse, one Disease and one Poison from the Imbiber.
Use: Teaches you how to transmute Essence of Air into Essence of Fire.
Use: Teaches you how to transmute Essence of Fire into Essence of Earth.
Use: Teaches you how to transmute Essence of Earth into Essence of Water.

Use: Teaches you how to make a Greater Fire Protection Potion.
Use: Absorbs 1950 to 3250 fire damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Requires Elemental Fire, Firebloom, Crystal Vial
Use: Teaches you how to make a Major Mana Potion.
Equip: Increases the effects that healing and mana potions have on the wearer by 33%.
Equip: Increases movement speed by 15% and restores 60 health every 5 sec. Allies within 30 yards receive half of this effect.

Use: You turn to stone, protecting you from all physical attacks and spells for 1 min, but during that time you cannot attack, move or cast spells.  You can only have the effect of one flask at a time.
Use: Summons an Eye of Kilrogg and binds your vision to it.  The eye moves quickly but is very fragile.
Use: Counters the enemy's spellcast, preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 10 sec.  Generates a high amount of threat.
Use: Increases the player's maximum health by 1200 for 2 hrs.  You can only have the effect of one flask at a time.  This effect persists through death.
Use: Increases the player's maximum mana by 2000 for 2 hrs.  You can only have the effect of one flask at a time.  This effect persists through death.
Use: Increases damage done by magical spells and effects by up to 150 for 2 hrs.  You can only have the effect of one flask at a time.  This effect persists through death.

Use: Increases your resistance to all schools of magic by 50 for 2 hrs.  You can only have the effect of one flask at a time.  This effect persists through death and stacks with all other resistance spells and items.
Use: Reduces an enemy's chance to hit by 10% for 12 sec.
Use: Harness the power of lightning to strike down all enemies around you for 200 Nature damage.
Use: Teaches you how to make an Alchemist's Stone.
Equip: Increases the effects that healing and mana potions have on the wearer by 33%.
Requires Essence of Fire (8), Essence of Earth (8), Essence of Air (8), Essence of Water (8), Living Essence (8), Black Vitriol (2), Black Lotus (4)
Use: Teaches you how to make a Flask of the Titans.
Use: Increases the player's maximum health by 1200 for 2 hrs.  You can only have the effect of one flask at a time.  This effect persists through death.

Use: Teaches you how to make a Flask of Distilled Wisdom.
Use: Increases the player's maximum mana by 2000 for 2 hrs.  You can only have the effect of one flask at a time.  This effect persists through death.

Use: Teaches you how to make a Flask of Chromatic Resistance.

Use: Increases your resistance to all schools of magic by 50 for 2 hrs.  You can only have the effect of one flask at a time.  This effect persists through death and stacks with all other resistance spells and items.

"Allows communication with the deceased of Caer Darrow."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"A small, fierce member of the Zerg swarm, the zergling is not to be trifled with. Very dangerous in high numbers."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"This pint-sized panda cub is highly sought after by adventurers around Azeroth - despite its narcoleptic nature."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"AND THE HEAVENS SHALL TREMBLE, AND MAN SHALL WEEP, AND THE END OF DAYS SHALL--wait, why are you so tall?"
